objectives: Write and run Python code for data-centric tasks
Use core Python data structures and functions to prepare for ML pipelines
learning_path.title: Python Foundations for ML Workflows

objectives: Query and filter datasets using SQL
Join tables and aggregate results to create analysis-ready datasets
learning_path.title: SQL for Data Retrieval and Preparation

objectives: Apply probability concepts relevant to learning algorithms
Use statistical reasoning to interpret data and model behavior
learning_path.title: Statistics and Probability for Modeling

objectives: Clean and transform raw data into model-ready inputs
Create and select features to improve learning performance
learning_path.title: Data Preprocessing and Feature Engineering

objectives: Explain core deep learning concepts and training dynamics
Design basic neural network architectures for common tasks
learning_path.title: Deep Learning Fundamentals

objectives: Train, monitor, and iterate on TensorFlow models
learning_path.title: TensorFlow Model Building and Training

objectives: Train and debug PyTorch models using standard workflows
learning_path.title: PyTorch Model Building and Training

objectives: Select appropriate evaluation metrics for different problem types
Perform validation strategies to estimate generalization and reduce overfitting
learning_path.title: Model Evaluation and Validation

matched_occupation.description: Computer vision engineers research, design, develop, and train artificial intelligence algorithms and machine learning primitives that understand the content of digital images based on a large amount of data. They apply this understanding to solve different real-world problems such as security, autonomous driving, robotic manufacturing, digital image classification, medical image processing and diagnosis, etc.
matched_occupation.label: computer vision engineer
